Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search CRM with a query related to "Sunbelt", "Palmetto", or "Axiom" using crm_search_companies to find the details of the new companies in the CRM database. Find that Axiom is listed as a prospect instead of a customer.
OE 2: Search Quickbooks with a query related to "Sunbelt", "Palmetto", or "Axiom" using quickbooks_search_customers to find the details of the new companies in the Quickbooks database. Find that Axiom is not listed.
OE 3: Search emails with a query "Sunbelt", "Palmetto", "Axiom", or "welcome" (or similar) using search_emails to find if the welcome message was sent to new companies. Find that there are no welcome emails sent.
OE 4: Search Calendar with a query "Sunbelt", "Palmetto", "Axiom", or "kick-off" (or similar) using calendar_search_events to find if there is any kickoff meeting set up for new clients. Find that there are no kick-off meetings set.
OE 5: Search AirTable with a query related to "company", "Sunbelt", "Palmetto", or "Axiom" (or similar) using airtable_search_records to find companies' details. Find that Axiom is listed as cold outreach instead of onboarding.
OE 6: Search AirTable with a query related to "relocation", "Sunbelt", "Palmetto", or "Axiom" (or similar) using airtable_search_records to find relocation status. Find that Noah Fitzpatrick's details are missing.
OE 7: Search emails with queries related to "Noah", "Fitzpatrick", or "Axiom" (or similar) using search_emails to find the relocation coordinator of Noah Fitzpatrick as Fatimah Al-Rashidi. Find that Fatimah mixed up Noah Fitzpatrick and Noah Fitzgerald, and sent the wrong apartment offer and flight ticket to Noah Fitzpatrick.
OE 8: Create calendar events for kick-off meetings with Sunbelt, Palmetto, and Axiom using calendar_add_calendar_event.
OE 9: Create a new customer record for Axiom Precision Manufacturing in Quickbooks using quickbooks_create_customer to add Axiom to the billing database.
OE 10: Update Axiom's Client Account record in Airtable using airtable_update_records to change the status from cold outreach to onboarding.
OE 11: Create a new relocation record for Noah Fitzpatrick in Airtable using airtable_create_record.
OE 12: Use crm_search_companies to look for companies' details in CRM.
OE 13: Use quickbooks_search_customers to look for companies' details in Quickbooks.
OE 14: Use calendar_search_events to look for whether there are any events created for kick-off meetings.
OE 15: Use airtable_search_records while looking for details about companies and Noah Fitzpatrick's relocation.
OE 16: Use calendar_add_calendar_event to add kick-off meetings for the new companies.
OE 17: Use quickbooks_create_customer to create Axiom's records.
OE 18: Use airtable_update_records to update Axiom's details on Airtable.
OE 19: Use airtable_create_record to create Noah Fitzpatrick's details on Airtable.
OE 20: Use "Noah Fitzpatrick" as the name in the query when creating the records in Airtable using airtable_create_record.
OE 21: Search email with queries "Axiom", "service", "agreement" (or similar) using search_emails to find that the services agreement was never drafted or sent to Carla Mendenhall at Axiom, despite Emeka noting it as pending. Notice that Axiom is missing a service agreement.
OE 22: Create Linear tickets with queries "Axiom" or "prospect" (or similar) using linear_create_issue to track Axiom's company type correction.
OE 23: Create Linear tickets with queries "Axiom" or "agreement" (or similar) using linear_create_issue to track Axiom's service agreement issue.
OE 24: Send welcome emails (via send_email) to the HR contacts at each new client: Carla Mendes at Sunbelt (carla.mendes@sunbeltvp.com), Rev. James Whitfield at Palmetto (jwhitfield@palmetto-foundation.org), and Carla Mendenhall at Axiom (c.mendenhall@axiomprecision.com), introducing MoveOps services and confirming next steps.
OE 25: Search Airtable relocation records using airtable_search_records for completed relocations under Sunbelt, Palmetto, and Axiom to identify relocatees who have already completed their moves (Marcus Rivera, Jade Thompson, Daniela Cruz from Sunbelt; Denise Hargrove from Palmetto). Attempt to find contact information to send check-in emails.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

outcome

outcome
